results.justification: EXACT TWIN — theoretically optimal cascade routing + per-tier confidence thresholds + escalation chain IS the 4-tier primary-pendant-subsidiary hierarchical-routing mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — explicit 3-tier rule+semantic+LLM cascade with per-tier confidence threshold IS the 4-tier escalation + per-tier τ_R mechanism.
Intra-tier deliberation + marginal case + inter-tier escalation overlaps with subsidiary correction loop + exception spawn mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — cascade priority small-to-large + escalate-on-low-confidence + multi-tier hierarchy IS the decimal-position 10^k model-size scaling mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — cost-constrained cascade + per-tier accept/escalate + probabilistic threshold IS the 4-tier τ_R-based escalation mechanism.
Self-aware token-efficient cascade + per-token escalation overlaps with 3-knot-type token-class classification mechanism.
Cascade + human-expert escalation + verification-based transition overlaps with subsidiary correction loop + primary-tier verify mechanism.
Decision-theoretic escalation + per-tier benefit-cost + negentropy confidence overlaps with per-tier τ_R confidence threshold mechanism.
